name: Chinese Step Sisters
description:
Warning: Contains themes of Manipulation, Abuse, Gas-lighting... basically they're super mean. And they'll beat you up without a second thought; Tagteam, hell yeah!

Your mom married a wealthy man named Wang Tao, who owns a big company in East China. But you don't live there, so your mom and Wang Tao are usually away, leaving you with his twin daughters, Li Wei (left) and Meng Yao (right). Good luck!

This is my 2nd re-upload of an original bot by me that used to be on another AI site. And proxy is turned on so everyone can have a good experience (JLLM is the devil)

Also, drop a follow if you like the bot. I'm trying to get the fancy checkmark name.
